text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah’s deputy political chief Mahmoud Qamati claimed the group has successfully repelled Israeli aggression despite the deployment of over 100,000 Israeli soldiers backed by tanks and aircraft. He said Israeli forces have not been able to hold any point inside Lebanese territory, and that around 150 Israeli tanks have been destroyed or disabled. Qamati stated that Hezbollah’s flexible tactics, based on urban warfare and hit‑and‑run operations, are raising attrition costs for the IDF. He added that the group has prepared for a long war and will accept no agreement without a full Israeli withdrawal from Lebanese land. @wfwitness

↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇱🇧 IDF announces the death of Staff Sergeant Guy Ludar, age 21 in Southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇱 Staff Sergeant Guy Lodar was killed in a friendly fire incident, according to Israeli Channel N12: The event occurred around 3:00 a.m. A commando force from the Maglan unit, operating under the command of Division 210, crossed the border to carry out a targeted mission in the village of Shebaa. This is an area with a predominantly Sunni population, where the IDF conducts focused operations from time to time. The objective of the operation was to arrest a militant linked to the Hezbollah terrorist organization. According to intelligence information, the suspect who was apprehended was responsible for maintaining ongoing coordination between Hezbollah and the Shebaa sector. During the operation, the force surrounded the building where the target was located and acted according to “arrest procedure,” at the end of which the suspect was successfully detained. However, during the activity, a friendly fire incident developed. While operating in the area, one of the soldiers identified figures who appeared to be fleeing the arrest scene and opened fire at them to prevent their escape, without realizing they were members of his own unit. As a result of the shooting, two soldiers from the force who were in the line of fire were hit: Lodar (of blessed memory) was struck and killed on the spot, and another soldier was seriously wounded. The IDF states that the incident is currently under a thorough investigation by operational echelons in Division 210 and the commando unit, with the aim of understanding the circumstances of the misidentification. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

An Israeli dog from the elite Commando Brigade's Maglan Unit, from Yuvalim was killed in a friendly fire accident and another officer seriously wounded after other Israelis throught they were Hezbullah They were all in Shebaa, a Sunni town with no Hezbullah to kidnap an innocent non-combatant local

OSINTdefender U.S. Federal Agents have detained the niece and grand-niece of Qassem ‌Soleimani, the Former Commander of the Quds Force under Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps who was killed in a strike order by President Donald J. Trump on Baghdad in 2020. According to a statement from the U.S. State Department, Hamideh Soleimani Afshar and her daughter were arrested by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) after their lawful permanent resident status was revoked by Secretary of State Marco Rubio, who additionally terminated the legal status of Fatemeh Ardeshir-Larijani, the daughter of Iranian politician Ali Larijani, and her husband Seyed Kalantar Motamedi in early April. tweet

⚡ 🇩🇪 Euronews: Germany has introduced a new rule requiring men aged 17 to 45 to obtain approval before traveling abroad for more than three months under updated military service laws. The measure is part of broader reforms aimed at strengthening the Bundeswehr, including improved personnel tracking and preparedness in case of future mobilization. @wfwitness

Renowned Political Economist Prof. Carlos Lopes We certainly have manifestations of agency. South Africa taking Israel to ICC, preparations for the ports that are going to be much more in demand, Ethiopian Airlines replacing Gulf air traffic amid crisis by increasing their footprint. But the most important manifestation has been the continental free trade area, modernization of tariffs… close to 90% indicates Africans are serious. Using Africa's savings for Africa's development is now a priority for many, which is very significant. The problem is, 80% of African saving is deposited outside the continent. If we repair that we won’t need as much external money as some believe. Africa Development Bank, together with others, is putting together a new African financial architecture, which is very optimistic. FULL INTERVIEW

Türkiye's Skydagger unveiled HUNTER, Türkiye's first interceptor (anti-drone) drone, now entering serial production. Fast (up to 320 km/h) and low-cost. Designed to ram and destroy enemy drones. Uses AI + thermal/day cameras for tracking. Purpose: Replace expensive missile-based air defense with a cheap, scalable drone hunter.

The US is deploying most of its long-range JASSM-ER stealth missiles for the Iran war, pulling them from global stockpiles. Only about 425 remain available worldwide out of 2,300 prewar. These missiles have been heavily used—over 1,000 in the first month—reducing reserves meant for other conflicts. Replacing them could take years. Source: Bloomberg

↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 A friendly fire incident in the southern Lebanese village of Shebaa (Mount Dov area) has left a Maglan unit soldier dead and another seriously wounded. The force was operating under the 210th Division around 3am, attempting to arrest a alleged Hezbollah collaborator who had been passing information on IDF activities. A soldier spotted what he believed were fleeing suspects and opened fire according to protocol for “escapees”. The figures hit were fellow Maglan fighters. One was killed, the other seriously wounded. The intended target was captured. The IDF has opened a full investigation. @wfwitness
From the WFW team, we wish all those celebrating a peaceful and blessed Easter 🐣 . May this day bring you warmth, hope, and a quiet sense of renewal, wherever you are. @wfwitness

🇺🇸 🇨🇳 Chinese holdings of US Treasury securities have fallen to their lowest level since the 2008 financial crisis, dropping from a peak of ~$1.3 trillion in 2011 to roughly $650 billion today. As the US wages war in the Middle East and escalates tensions with Beijing, China continues quietly offloading American debt. The trend has accelerated sharply since 2022. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

🇮🇷 "I can claim: the Strait of Hormuz will never reopen." Oil and energy expert Behzad Ahmadi-Nia, speaking to BBC: "The Islamic Republic accomplished something impossible — closing the Strait of Hormuz. America had 24 hours to prevent it. At great cost — and it still didn't do it." According to Kpler and Tanker Tracker data: since the start of the war, Iran's oil exports have increased in volume and oil revenue has doubled while Kuwait, Iraq, Qatar, and the UAE have been unable to export a single barrel for over a month. "Iran's regional power has increased several times over. No one can easily joke about sanctions, economic pressure, or oil threats with Iran anymore." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Today, two U.S. HC-130J specialized aircraft arrived in the Middle East from Germany. These aircraft are expected to be used in the search-and-rescue operation for the remaining crew member of the downed F-15 in Iran. For the United States, locating and extracting the pilot is now critically important, both to avoid internal political pressure and to prevent the possibility of the pilot being used by Iran as leverage in a potential prisoner negotiation. It is expected that the U.S. may conduct another large-scale and high-risk insertion into Iranian territory in order to recover the downed pilot. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet

ELINT News RT @manniefabian : The IDF confirms bombing petrochemical facilities in southern Iran earlier today, saying the sites were used by the regime to manufacture materials for ballistic missiles. According to the military, the strikes led to a halt in all production of the chemical materials, and are also expected to cause billions of dollars in financial damage. Last week, The Times of Israel reported that Israel’s political leadership instructed the IDF to shift to striking “economic targets” in Iran, aimed at causing massive financial damage to the regime. Petrochemical facilities in southwest Iran were hit by Israeli airstrikes a short while ago, according to Iranian media. The Fars news agency reports that several facilities at the Mahshahr Petrochemical Special Zone in the Khuzestan Province were hit by strikes. The report says smoke is rising from the area and there may be casualties. - Emanuel (Mannie) Fabian tweet

🇮🇷 Ayatollah Ameli: "In history, three times women have taken the lead — surpassing the men." The first: at the burial of the martyrs of Karbala, when the men were afraid to step forward, the women came first. The second: in Kufa, when the captives were to be sent to Damascus, the women accompanied the caravan with dignity, led by Lady Zainab. "The third is in our time. The enemy is bewildered — a woman with bombs falling above her head, yet reciting epic poetry." He had just witnessed a mother who lost eight members of her family to martyrdom, still standing, still chanting. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
